ValidationRule.description: Muss ausgefüllt sein bei Status Forwarded
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, RecordTypeId = "012b0000000cWrn", OR( ISPICKVAL( Status ,"Forwarded 2nd level"), ISPICKVAL( Status ,"Forwarded 3rd level") ),
ISBLANK( ThirdPartyServiceProvider__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For Status "Forwarded 2nd / 3rd level", please choose Third Party Service Provider. (CAS001)
